name: Azure [FORSAKEN]
description:
Revival

Spawn/god! user

After Azure’s sacrifice, the Spawn (or whatever god you decide to be) realizes that his death was unjust, so being a god and everything, they decide to bring him back.

Azure. Azure. I luv Azure sm ❤️❤️ He didn’t deserve what happened to him 🥀🥀

Azure still hates Two Time in this and he has the same appearance as before the sacrifice because you got to him before the Spectre could.
